note: Added TestReviewRunReleasesStaggeredClaudeGroupConcurrently in internal/app/review_stagger_test.go. Each held attempt blocks inside the transport on an all-in-flight barrier (allHeldInFlight) that opens only when all len(reviewLenses)-1 held attempts are simultaneously present; a serialized one-at-a-time release deadlocks the first held attempt and the test fails as 'release was serialized'. Verified it fails (5.1s timeout) when launchReviewerLensTasks is temporarily serialized, and passes -race -count=3 against the concurrent implementation.

Edited docs/agents.md 'Review run rounds' section: replaced 'five concurrent lens attempts per resolved reviewer' with 'five lens attempts per resolved reviewer, launched concurrently except that same-model Claude groups are staggered (one lead warms the prompt cache before the rest)', matching the qualified phrasing used in the other two mentions.
